title: Her Soul.
content:
To me not only does her soul suggest
    Palms and the peace of tropic shore and wood,
    But, oceaned far beyond the golden West,
    The Fortunate Islands of true Womanhood.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Madison Julius Cawein delivers a powerful performance in "Her Soul."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
